ddls:
CREATE TABLE "puzzles" (
  "puzzle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each puzzle */,
  "puzzle_name" TEXT /* Name of the puzzle */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the puzzle */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the puzzle (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "theme" TEXT /* Theme of the puzzle (e.g., adventure, mystery, sci-fi) */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the puzzle creator */,
  "puzzle_type" TEXT /* Type of puzzle (e.g., mechanical, logic, riddle) */,
  "hints" TEXT /* Hints available for the puzzle */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the puzzle was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("puzzle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_puzzles_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES team_members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rooms" (
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room */,
  "room_name" TEXT /* Name of the room */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the room */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of players allowed in the room */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the room */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Hours when the room is open for bookings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "puzzle_instances" (
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each puzzle instance */,
  "puzzle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the puzzle */,
  "room_id" INTEGER /* ID of the room where the puzzle is located */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the puzzle instance */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the puzzle instance */,
  "gm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game master overseeing the instance */,
  "clues_given" INTEGER /* Number of clues given to the team */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any special notes or comments about the instance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_puzzle_instances_gm_id FOREIGN KEY ("gm_id") REFERENCES game_masters ("gm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_puzzle_instances_puzzle_id FOREIGN KEY ("puzzle_id") REFERENCES puzzles ("puzzle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_puzzle_instances_room_id FOREIGN KEY ("room_id") REFERENCES rooms ("room_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the team was created */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team captain */,
  "team_type" TEXT /* Type of team (e.g., corporate, family, friends) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the member belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the team member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the team member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role within the team (e.g., leader, member) */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Date and time the member joined the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solves" (
  "solve_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each solve */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the puzzle instance being solved */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team solving the puzzle */,
  "solve_time" TEXT /* Time when the puzzle was solved */,
  "incorrect_guesses" INTEGER /* Number of incorrect guesses made by the team */,
  "solved_by" TEXT /* IDs of the team members who solved the puzzle */,
  "clues_used" INTEGER /* Number of clues used by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("solve_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solves_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES puzzle_instances ("instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solves_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "puzzle_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each puzzle performance metric */,
  "puzzle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the puzzle being measured */,
  "average_solve_time" REAL /* Average solve time for the puzzle */,
  "average_incorrect_guesses" REAL /* Average number of incorrect guesses for the puzzle */,
  "success_rate" REAL /* Percentage of successful solves */,
  "average_clues_used" REAL /* Average number of clues used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_puzzle_performance_puzzle_id FOREIGN KEY ("puzzle_id") REFERENCES puzzles ("puzzle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team performance metric */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team being measured */,
  "average_solve_time" REAL /* Average solve time for the team */,
  "average_incorrect_guesses" REAL /* Average number of incorrect guesses for the team */,
  "total_puzzles_solved" INTEGER /* Total number of puzzles solved by the team */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_masters" (
  "gm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game master */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the game master */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the game master */,
  "experience_level" TEXT /* Experience level of the game master (e.g., beginner, intermediate, expert) */,
  "training_status" TEXT /* Training status (e.g., trained, in-training) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "room_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "gm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game master being assigned */,
  "room_id" INTEGER /* ID of the room being assigned */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date of the assignment */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the assignment */,
  "special_notes" TEXT /* Any special notes or instructions for the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_room_assignments_room_id FOREIGN KEY ("room_id") REFERENCES rooms ("room_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_room_assignments_gm_id FOREIGN KEY ("gm_id") REFERENCES game_masters ("gm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the puzzle instance being attempted */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team making the attempt */,
  "attempt_time" TEXT /* Time when the attempt was made */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the attempt (e.g., correct, incorrect) */,
  "attempted_by" TEXT /* IDs of the team members who made the attempt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES puzzle_instances ("instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team being ranked */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the team */,
  "ranking_date" TEXT /* Date of the ranking */,
  "achievements" TEXT /* Any special achievements or milestones */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
